positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for vladimir_conclusion_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~taiwanese_citizen(X0) | ~us_citizen(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    vladimir != ekaterina).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~taiwanese_citizen(vladimir)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    russian_federation_official(vladimir)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    us_citizen(X0) | taiwanese_citizen(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~russian_federation_official(X0) | ~taiwanese_citizen(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define can_register_to_vote_us(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define can_participate_2024_election_us(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define gazprom_manager(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
